title: poa angustifolia subsp. costata
intro: Poa angustifolia subsp. costata, a subspecies of the Poa angustifolia plant, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Poa angustifolia subsp. costata include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea or using it in a tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
